name: memory-plugin
description: Layered Codex memory files, startup hook, and memory skill for durable cross-session operating context.

interface.shortDescription: Use layered Codex memory across sessions.
interface.longDescription: Memory Plugin provides a layered memory convention, a SessionStart hook template, and a memory skill for managing long-term rules, active work, parked context, archives, task cache, and handoff notes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the memory plugin to maintain layered session memory.
